Risk Title: New Bag Tool feature - Change in Technology
Risk Desc: Context: As part of the technical design for the new Bag Tool
Risk Type: introducing a change in the underlying technology stack. Condition: This technology shift is expected to impact the delivery timelines for the Increment 7 release. To address this
Risk Subtype: United will engage a Subject Matter Expert (SME) on OpenSearch to review and discuss the design implications in detail. Consequence: From a delivery perspective
